payload.answer: Denied. Normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands, and no memory deletion or durable memory update was performed.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL command attempt from a normal user, not a durable user memory fact.

details: Rejected unauthorized admin command: /brain admin sql DELETE FROM memory_cards;
No memory cards were created, updated, or deleted.

repair_options: Ask an authorized administrator to perform administrative maintenance through approved tools.
If the goal is to delete your own remembered data, use the supported user-facing memory deletion command or request a privacy deletion workflow.
